en_title: Supergirl Producer Says David Ellison Is a 'Big Fan' of DC Studios As Paramount and Warner Bros Merger Looms
cn_title: 《超级少女》制片人称David Ellison是DC铁粉
subtitle: 大佬探班，一切安好
opus_summary: 《超级少女》制片人Lars P. Winther透露，派拉蒙Skydance CEO David Ellison已探班《明日之人》片场，并对DC当前规划持开放态度。

paragraphs.en: David Ellison, the CEO of Paramount Skydance, is a big fan of what DC Studios is cooking up.
paragraphs.cn: 派拉蒙Skydance的CEO David Ellison是DC影业正在打造的项目的一位铁杆粉丝。

paragraphs.en: When speaking with The Hollywood Reporter , Supergirl producer Lars P. Winther stated that David Ellison has already visited the set of Man of Tomorrow, the Superman sequel from James Gunn, which has been filming for about two months and will feature Supergirl .
paragraphs.cn: 在接受《好莱坞报道者》采访时，《超级少女》制片人Lars P. Winther表示，David Ellison已经探访了《明日之人》的片场，这部由詹姆斯·古恩执导的《超人》续集已经拍摄了大约两个月，并且会有超级少女登场。

paragraphs.en: “He came to Trilith [Studios] already. That’s where we shoot all our movies that James [Gunn] directs,” Winther said. “He came to Atlanta, we showed him everything, and we’re having discussions with him.”
paragraphs.cn: 「他已经来过Trilith（制片厂）了，我们所有詹姆斯（古恩）执导的电影都是在这里拍的，」Winther说，「他来了亚特兰大，我们向他展示了所有东西，正在和他进行商讨。」

paragraphs.en: The producer went on to note that Ellison is "open to" what DC is doing and is a "big fan," suggesting there is no reason to raise any alarms.
paragraphs.cn: 这位制片人接着表示，Ellison对DC正在做的事情「持开放态度」而且是「铁杆粉丝」，并暗示没什么好担心的。

paragraphs.en: “He’s pretty open to what we’re doing. We do have a slate and a lot of it — obviously, Clayface is already coming out. We already have the Lanterns TV show. On those things, the train’s left the station. So we’re good. But he’s a big fan, he’s been great with us. He’s giving us kind of what we want. So far, everything’s good.”
paragraphs.cn: 「他对于我们在做的事情相当开放。我们确实有一系列规划，其中很多已经——很明显，泥脸（Clayface）的电影很快就要上映了，《绿灯侠》剧集也在推进了。这些事情都已经板上钉钉了，所以我们没问题。但他是个铁杆粉丝，和我们合作得非常棒。他基本给了我们想要的东西。到目前为止，一切顺利。」

paragraphs.en: Ellison is currently trying to merge Paramount with Warner Bros. , the parent company of DC. Some feared that Ellison might pull the plug on the current iteration of DC in an effort to pinch pennies or create something that is aligned with what a new regime would want. So far, Ellison has yet to indicate that publicly, but nothing is ever off the table when someone is spending billions of dollars to take control of a company.
paragraphs.cn: Ellison目前正试图将派拉蒙与DC的母公司华纳兄弟合并。一些人担心，Ellison为了省钱或打造符合新管理层意愿的东西，可能会叫停DC目前的布局。到目前为止，Ellison尚未公开表露过这种想法，但在有人花费数十亿美元来掌控一家公司时，没有什么是绝对不可能的。

paragraphs.en: The new era of DC has really only just begun. 2025's Superman was the first film in the new DC universe, and Supergirl, releasing in theaters this weekend, will be the second. There are a few more projects on the horizon with Clayface and Lanterns later this year , as well as The Batman Part II and Man of Tomorrow in 2027. Beyond that, things are a bit fuzzier.
paragraphs.cn: DC的新纪元其实才刚刚开始。2025年的《超人》是新DC宇宙的第一部电影，本周上映的《超级少女》将是第二部。还有几个项目即将推出，包括今年晚些时候的《泥面人》和《绿灯侠》，以及2027年的《新蝙蝠侠2》和《明日之人》。在那之后，事情就不太明朗了。

paragraphs.en: Given Warner Bros spent a decade trying to get the previous DC universe under control with various power struggles between executives, directors, and other creatives, it seems like it would be wise to just leave things alone rather than reboot the entire thing once again. Even if some things need to change, it's clear that tons of meddling and an inconsistent vision only does more harm to a brand.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到华纳兄弟花了十年时间试图让之前的DC宇宙走上正轨，期间高管、导演和其他创意人员之间发生了各种权力斗争，似乎明智的做法是保持现状，而不是再次全盘重启。即使有些事情需要改变，但过多干预和缺乏一致的愿景只会对品牌造成更大伤害。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道各类娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上找到他@Cade_Onder。

pending_dict.reason: 詹姆斯·古恩执导的《超人》续集，目前尚无官方中文译名，暂译为《明日之人》
